description: EBCDIC ordering: space < period. True in both EBCDIC (0x40 < 0x4B) and ASCII (0x20 < 0x2E).
notes: In EBCDIC cp037: space=0x40, period=0x4B. In ASCII: space=0x20, period=0x2E. Both orderings agree that space < period, so this test passes regardless of collating sequence. Verifies special-character comparison does not break ebcdic_compare().
